description: Fetch all lead rows from Google Sheets

config.custom_code: Keep only leads with score >= threshold

prompt: For each lead, resolve the Sales Person field to an email address. If sales_person_format config is 'email', use the Sales Person value directly as resolved_email. If sales_person_format is 'name', lookup the Sales Person value in the sales_person_email_mapping config to get the resolved_email. If lookup fails or mapping is missing, set resolved_email to null. Return array of leads with all original fields plus resolved_email field.
description: Resolve sales person field to email addresses using format and mapping

leads.description: Array of lead objects with resolved_email field added

config.instruction: For each lead, resolve the Sales Person field to an email address. If sales_person_format config is 'email', use the Sales Person value directly as resolved_email. If sales_person_format is 'name', lookup the Sales Person value in the sales_person_email_mapping config to get the resolved_email. If lookup fails or mapping is missing, set resolved_email to null. Return array of leads with all original fields plus resolved_email field.

description: Group leads with resolved emails by sales person email

config.custom_code: Group leads by resolved_email field to create per-salesperson collections

steps.prompt: Create a sales-friendly follow-up email for this sales person. Include: (1) greeting, (2) HTML table with columns: Date, Lead Name, Company, Email, Phone, Stage, Notes, Lead Score, High-Quality (Yes), Reason/Notes (brief explanation of why high-quality), (3) for each lead, suggest a next step based on Stage and Notes fields, (4) professional closing. Return object with 'subject' and 'body' fields.
steps.description: Generate sales-friendly follow-up email with embedded table

body.description: HTML email body with embedded table and follow-up guidance

config.instruction: Create a sales-friendly follow-up email for this sales person. Include: (1) greeting, (2) HTML table with columns: Date, Lead Name, Company, Email, Phone, Stage, Notes, Lead Score, High-Quality (Yes), Reason/Notes (brief explanation of why high-quality), (3) for each lead, suggest a next step based on Stage and Notes fields, (4) professional closing. Return object with 'subject' and 'body' fields.

steps.description: Send follow-up email to sales person

steps.prompt: Create an email notifying the user about high-quality leads where the sales person email could not be resolved. Include: (1) explanation of the issue, (2) HTML table with columns: Date, Lead Name, Company, Email, Phone, Stage, Notes, Sales Person, Lead Score, High-Quality (Yes), Reason/Notes, (3) request to update sales person email mapping. Return object with 'subject' and 'body' fields.
steps.description: Generate fallback email for unresolved leads

body.description: HTML email body with embedded table
